appropriate_uses: IRGC institutional position, claimed action, maritime warning language, and operational leads.
inappropriate_uses: Independent confirmation of attacks, attribution, vessel conduct, warning receipt, navigation status, or battle damage.
known_failure_modes: Wartime strategic messaging; selective disclosure; absent vessel identifiers; attribution and battle-damage incentives; Persian-only access.
name: Sepah News / IRGC Public Relations
observables: IRGC statements, warnings, claimed actions, and named operations
originating_chain_rule: Repetition of an IRGC Public Relations statement by Sepah News, Iranian state media, aggregators, or foreign reporting remains one IRGC official chain.

review_history.note: Admitted after direct recovery of the Persian Sepah News primary page for Operation Nasr 2 Notice No. 6; bounded to official-position use.
